68→\t\tif (this._length <= limit) {\n    69→\t\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit.update(this._length, false);\n    70→\n    71→\t\t\t// reverse and create arrays of the exact length\n    72→\t\t\tconst 75→\t\t\t\tstartIndexes[k] = this._startIndexes[i];\n    76→\t\t\t\tendIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n    77→\t\t\t}\n    78→\t\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes);\n    79→\t\t} else {\n    80→\t\t\tthis._foldingRangesLimit.update(this._length, limit);\n    81→\n    82→\t\t\tlet entries = 0;\n    83→\t\t\tlet maxIndent = this._indentOccurrences.length;\n    84→\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._indentOccurrences.length; i++) {\n    85→\t\t\t\tconst n = this._indentOccurrences[i];\n    86→\t\t\t\tif (n) {\n    87→\t\t\t\t\tif (n + entries > limit) {\n    88→\t\t\t\t\t\tmaxIndent = i;\n    89→\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n    90→\t\t\t\t\t}\n    91→\t\t\t\t\tentries += n;\n    92→\t\t\t\t}\n    93→\t\t\t}\n    94→\t\t\tconst tabSize = Uint32Array(limit);\n    98→\t\t\tfor (let i = this._length - 1, k = 0; i >= 0; i--) {\n    99→\t\t\t\tconst startIndex = this._startIndexes[i];\n   100→\t\t\t\tconst lineContent = model.getLineContent(startIndex);\n   101→\t\t\t\tconst indent = computeIndentLevel(lineContent, tabSize);\n   102→\t\t\t\tif (indent < maxIndent || (indent === maxIndent && entries++ < limit)) {\n   103→\t\t\t\t\tstartIndexes[k] = startIndex;\n   104→\t\t\t\t\tendIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n   105→\t\t\t\t\tk++;\n   106→\t\t\t\t}\n   107→\t\t\t}\n   108→\t\t\treturn new 117→\tendAbove: number; // end line number for the region above\n   118→\tline: number; // start line of the region. Only used for marker regions.\n   119→}\n   120→\n   121→const foldingRangesLimitDefault: FoldingLimitReporter = {\n   122→\tlimit: MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS_FOR_INDENT_DEFAULT,\n   123→\tupdate: () => { }\n   124→};\n   125→\n   126→export function computeRanges(model: ITextModel, offSide: boolean, markers?: FoldingMarkers, foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter = foldingRangesLimitDefault): FoldingRegions {\n   127→\tconst tabSize = model.getOptions().tabSize;\n   128→\tconst result = new RangesCollector(foldingRangesLimit);\n   129→\n   130→\tlet pattern: RegExp | undefined = undefined;\n   131→\tif (markers) {\n   132→\t\tpattern = new RegExp(`(${markers.start.source})|(?:${markers.end.source})`);\n   133→\t}\n   134→\n   135→\tconst previousRegions: PreviousRegion[] = [];\n   136→\tconst line = model.getLineCount() + 1;\n   137→\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent: -1, endAbove: line, line }); // sentinel, to make sure there's at least one entry\n   138→\n   139→\tfor (let line = model.getLineCount(); line > 0; line--) {\n   140→\t\tconst lineContent = model.getLineContent(line);\n   141→\t\tconst indent = computeIndentLevel(lineContent, tabSize);\n   142→\t\tlet previous = previousRegions[previousRegions.length - 1];\n   143→\t\tif (indent === -1) {\n   144→\t\t\tif (offSide) {\n   145→\t\t\t\t// for offSide languages, empty lines are associated to the previous block\n   146→\t\t\t\t// note: the next block is already written to the results, so this only\n   147→\t\t\t\t// impacts the end position of the block before\n   148→\t\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   149→\t\t\t}\n   150→\t\t\tcontinue; // only whitespace\n   151→\t\t}\n   152→\t\tlet m;\n   153→\t\tif (pattern && (m = lineContent.match(pattern))) {\n   154→\t\t\t// folding pattern match\n   155→\t\t\tif (m[1]) { // start pattern match\n   156→\t\t\t\t// discard all regions until the folding pattern\n   157→\t\t\t\tlet i = previousRegions.length - 1;\n   158→\t\t\t\twhile (i > 0 && previousRegions[i].indent !== -2) {\n   159→\t\t\t\t\ti--;\n   160→\t\t\t\t}\n   161→\t\t\t\tif (i > 0) {\n   162→\t\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.length = i + 1;\n   163→\t\t\t\t\tprevious = previousRegions[i];\n   164→\n   165→\t\t\t\t\t// new folding range from pattern, includes the end line\n   166→\t\t\t\t\tresult.insertFirst(line, previous.line, indent);\n   167→\t\t\t\t\tprevious.line = line;\n   168→\t\t\t\t\tprevious.indent = indent;\n   169→\t\t\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   170→\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   171→\t\t\t\t} else {\n   172→\t\t\t\t\t// no end marker found, treat line as a regular line\n   173→\t\t\t\t}\n   174→\t\t\t} else { // end pattern match\n   175→\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent: -2, endAbove: line, line });\n   176→\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   177→\t\t\t}\n   178→\t\t}\n   179→\t\tif (previous.indent > indent) {\n   180→\t\t\t// discard all regions with larger indent\n   181→\t\t\tdo {\n   182→\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.pop();\n   183→\t\t\t\tprevious = previousRegions[previousRegions.length - 1];\n   184→\t\t\t} while (previous.indent > indent);\n   185→\n   186→\t\t\t// new folding range\n   187→\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = previous.endAbove - 1;\n   188→\t\t\tif (endLineNumber - line >= 1) { // needs at east size 1\n   189→\t\t\t\tresult.insertFirst(line, endLineNumber, indent);\n   190→\t\t\t}\n   191→\t\t}\n   192→\t\tif (previous.indent === indent) {\n   193→\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   194→\t\t} else { // previous.indent < indent\n   195→\t\t\t// new region with a bigger indent\n   196→\t\t\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent, endAbove: line, line });\n   197→\t\t}\n   198→\t}\n   199→\treturn result.toIndentRanges(model);\n   200→}\n   201→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. selections) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst lineNumber = selection.selectionStartLineNumber;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (this.hiddenRangeModel && this.hiddenRangeModel.isHidden(lineNumber)) onUnexpectedError);\n\n\t}\n\n\tprivate onEditorMouseDown(e: IEditorMouseEvent): void {\n\t\tthis.mouseDownInfo = null;\n\n\n\t\tif (!this.hiddenRangeModel || !e.target || !e.target.range) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (!e.event.leftButton && !e.event.middleButton) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst range = e.target.range;\n\t\tlet iconClicked = false;\n\t\tswitch (e.target.type) {\n\t\t\tcase MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS: {\n\t\t\t\tconst data = e.target.detail;\n\t\t\t\tconst offsetLeftInGutter = e.target.element!.offsetLeft;\n\t\t\t\tconst gutterOffsetX = data.offsetX - offsetLeftInGutter;\n\n\t\t\t\t// const gutterOffsetX = data.offsetX - data.glyphMarginWidth - data.lineNumbersWidth - data.glyphMarginLeft;\n\n\t\t\t\t// TODO@joao TODO@alex TODO@martin this is such that we don't collide with dirty diff\n\t\t\t\tif (gutterOffsetX < 4) { // the whitespace between the border and the real folding icon border is 4px\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\ticonClicked = true;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase MouseTargetType.CONTENT_EMPTY: {\n\t\t\t\tif (this._unfoldOnClickAfterEndOfLine && MouseTargetType.CONTENT_TEXT: {\n\t\t\t\tif (this.hiddenRangeModel.hasRanges()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\t\t\tif (model && range.startColumn === model.getLineMaxColumn(range.startLineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tthis.mouseDownInfo = { lineNumber: range.startLineNumber, iconClicked };\n\t}\n\n\tprivate onEditorMouseUp(e: IEditorMouseEvent): void {\n\t\tconst foldingModel = this.foldingModel;\n\t\tif (!foldingModel || !this.mouseDownInfo || !e.target) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst lineNumber = this.mouseDownInfo.lineNumber;\n\t\tconst iconClicked = this.mouseDownInfo.iconClicked;\n\n\t\tconst range = e.target.range;\n\t\tif (!range || range.startLineNumber !== lineNumber) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (iconClicked) {\n\t\t\tif (e.target.type !== MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\tif (!model || range.startColumn !== model.getLineMaxColumn(lineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst region = foldingModel.getRegionAtLine(lineNumber);\n\t\tif (region && region.startLineNumber === lineNumber) {\n\t\t\tconst isCollapsed = region.isCollapsed;\n\t\t\tif (iconClicked || isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\tconst surrounding = e.event.altKey;\n\t\t\t\tlet toToggle = [];\n\t\t\t\tif (surrounding) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst filter = (otherRegion: FoldingRegion) => !otherRegion.containedBy(region) && !region.containedBy(otherRegion);\n\t\t\t\t\tconst toMaybeToggle = foldingModel.getRegionsInside(null, filter);\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of toMaybeToggle) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// if any surrounding regions are folded, unfold those. Otherwise, fold all surrounding\n\t\t\t\t\tif (toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle = toMaybeToggle;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst recursive = e.event.middleButton || e.event.shiftKey;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (recursive) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of foldingModel.getRegionsInside(region)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed === isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// when recursive, first only collapse all children. If all are already folded or there are no children, also fold parent.\n\t\t\t\t\tif (isCollapsed || !recursive || toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(region);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfoldingModel.toggleCollapseState(toToggle);\n\t\t\t\tthis.reveal({ lineNumber, column: 1 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpublic MAX_LINE_NUMBER = 0xFFFFFF;\n    35→\n    36→const MASK_INDENT = 0xFF000000;\n    37→\n    38→class BitField {\n    39→\tprivate readonly _states: Uint32Array;\n    40→\tconstructor(size: number) {\n    41→\t\tconst numWords = Math.ceil(size / 32);\n    42→\t\tthis._states = new Uint32Array(numWords);\n    43→\t}\n    44→\n    45→\tpublic get(index: number): boolean {\n    46→\t\tconst arrayIndex = (index / 32) | 0;\n    47→\t\tconst bit = index % 32;\n    48→\t\treturn (this._states[arrayIndex] & (1 << bit)) !== 0;\n    49→\t}\n    50→\n    51→\tpublic set(index: number, newState: boolean) {\n    52→\t\tconst arrayIndex = (index / 32) | 0;\n    53→\t\tconst bit = index % 32;\n    54→\t\tconst value = this._states[arrayIndex];\n    55→\t\tif (newState) {\n    56→\t\t\tthis._states[arrayIndex] = value | (1 << bit);\n    57→\t\t} else {\n    58→\t\t\tthis._states[arrayIndex] = value & ~(1 << bit);\n    59→\t\t}\n    60→\t}\n    61→}\n    62→\n    63→export class FoldingRegions {\n    64→\tprivate readonly _startIndexes: Uint32Array;\n    65→\tprivate readonly _endIndexes: Uint32Array;\n    66→\tprivate readonly _collapseStates: BitField;\n    67→\tprivate readonly _userDefinedStates: BitField;\n    68→\tprivate readonly _recoveredStates: BitField;\n    69→\n    70→\tprivate _parentsComputed: boolean;\n    71→\tprivate readonly _types: Array<string | undefined> | undefined;\n    72→\n    73→\tconstructor(startIndexes: Uint32Array, endIndexes: Uint32Array, types?: Array<string | undefined>) {\n    74→\t\tif (startIndexes.length !== endIndexes.length || startIndexes.length > MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS) {\n    75→\t\t\tthrow new Error('invalid startIndexes or endIndexes size');\n    76→\t\t}\n    77→\t\tthis._startIndexes = startIndexes;\n    78→\t\tthis._endIndexes = endIndexes;\n    79→\t\tthis._collapseStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    80→\t\tthis._userDefinedStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    81→\t\tthis._recoveredStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    82→\t\tthis._types = types;\n    83→\t\tthis._parentsComputed = false;\n    84→\t}\n    85→\n    86→\tprivate ensureParentIndices() {\n    87→\t\tif (!this._parentsComputed) {\n    88→\t\t\tthis._parentsComputed = true;\n    89→\t\t\tconst parentIndexes: number[] = [];\n    90→\t\t\tconst isInsideLast = (startLineNumber: number, endLineNumber: number) => {\n    91→\t\t\t\tconst index = parentIndexes[parentIndexes.length - 1];\n    92→\t\t\t\treturn this.getStartLineNumber(index) <= startLineNumber && this.getEndLineNumber(index) >= endLineNumber;\n    93→\t\t\t};\n    94→\t\t\tfor (let i = 0, len = this._startIndexes.length; i < len; i++) {\n    95→\t\t\t\tconst startLineNumber = this._startIndexes[i];\n    96→\t\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = this._endIndexes[i];\n    97→\t\t\t\tif (startLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER || endLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER) {\n    98→\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('startLineNumber or endLineNumber must not exceed ' + MAX_LINE_NUMBER);\n    99→\t\t\t\t}\n   100→\t\t\t\twhile (parentIndexes.length > 0 && !isInsideLast(startLineNumber, endLineNumber)) {\n   101→\t\t\t\t\tparentIndexes.pop();\n   102→\t\t\t\t}\n   103→\t\t\t\tconst parentIndex = parentIndexes.length > 0 ? parentIndexes[parentIndexes.length - 1] : -1;\n   104→\t\t\t\tparentIndexes.push(i);\n   105→\t\t\t\tthis._startIndexes[i] = startLineNumber + ((parentIndex & 0xFF) << 24);\n   106→\t\t\t\tthis._endIndexes[i] = endLineNumber + ((parentIndex & 0xFF00) << 16);\n   107→\t\t\t}\n   108→\t\t}\n   109→\t}\n   110→\n   111→\tpublic get length(): number {\n   112→\t\treturn this._startIndexes.length;\n   113→\t}\n   114→\n   115→\tpublic 120→\t\treturn this._endIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER;\n   121→\t}\n   122→\n   123→\tpublic getType(index: number): string | undefined {\n   124→\t\treturn this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined;\n   125→\t}\n   126→\n   127→\tpublic hasTypes() {\n   128→\t\treturn !!this._types;\n   129→\t}\n   130→\n   131→\tpublic isCollapsed(index: number): boolean {\n   132→\t\treturn 139→\tprivate isUserDefined(index: number): boolean {\n   140→\t\treturn this._userDefinedStates.get(index);\n   141→\t}\n   142→\n   143→\tprivate setUserDefined(index: number, newState: boolean) {\n 149→\t}\n   150→\n   151→\tprivate setRecovered(index: number, newState: boolean) {\n   152→\t\treturn this._recoveredStates.set(index, newState);\n   153→\t}\n   154→\n   155→\tpublic 169→\t\t\tthis.setUserDefined(index, false);\n   170→\t\t\tthis.setRecovered(index, true);\n   171→\t\t} else {\n   172→\t\t\tthis.setUserDefined(index, false);\n   173→\t\t\tthis.setRecovered(index, false);\n   174→\t\t}\n   175→\t}\n   176→\n   177→\tpublic setCollapsedAllOfType(type: string, newState: boolean) {\n   178→\t\tlet hasChanged = false;\n   179→\t\tif (this._types) {\n   180→\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < this._types.length; i++) {\n   181→\t\t\t\tif (this._types[i] === type) {\n   182→\t\t\t\t\tthis.setCollapsed(i, newState);\n   183→\t\t\t\t\thasChanged = true;\n   184→\t\t\t\t}\n   185→\t\t\t}\n   186→\t\t}\n   187→\t\treturn hasChanged;\n   188→\t}\n   189→\n   190→\tpublic toRegion(index: number): FoldingRegion {\n   191→\t\treturn new FoldingRegion(this, index);\n   192→\t}\n   193→\n   194→\tpublic getParentIndex(index: number) {\n   195→\t\tthis.ensureParentIndices();\n   196→\t\tconst parent = ((this._startIndexes[index] & MASK_INDENT) >>> 24) + ((this._endIndexes[index] & MASK_INDENT) >>> 16);\n   197→\t\tif (parent === MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS) {\n   198→\t\t\treturn -1;\n   199→\t\t}\n   200→\t\treturn parent;\n   201→\t}\n   202→\n   203→\tpublic contains(index: number, line: number) {\n   204→\t\treturn this.getStartLineNumber(index) <= line && this.getEndLineNumber(index) >= line;\n   205→\t}\n   206→\n   207→\tprivate findIndex(line: number) {\n   208→\t\tlet low = 0, high = this._startIndexes.length;\n   209→\t\tif (high === 0) {\n   210→\t\t\treturn -1; // no children\n   211→\t\t}\n   212→\t\twhile (low < high) {\n   213→\t\t\tconst mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);\n   214→\t\t\tif (line < this.getStartLineNumber(mid)) {\n   215→\t\t\t\thigh = mid;\n   216→\t\t\t} else {\n   217→\t\t\t\tlow = mid + 1;\n   218→\t\t\t}\n   219→\t\t}\n   220→\t\treturn low - 1;\n   221→\t}\n   222→\n   223→\tpublic findRange(line: number): number {\n   224→\t\tlet index = this.findIndex(line);\n   225→\t\tif (index >= 0) {\n   226→\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = this.getEndLineNumber(index);\n   227→\t\t\tif (endLineNumber >= line) {\n   228→\t\t\t\treturn index;\n   229→\t\t\t}\n   230→\t\t\tindex = this.getParentIndex(index);\n   231→\t\t\twhile (index !== -1) {\n   232→\t\t\t\tif (this.contains(index, line)) {\n   233→\t\t\t\t\treturn index;\n   234→\t\t\t\t}\n   235→\t\t\t\tindex = An entry is invalid if:\n   297→\t * \t\tthe start and end line numbers aren't a valid range of line numbers,\n   298→\t * \t\tit is out of sequence or has the same start line as a preceding entry,\n   299→\t * \t\tit overlaps a preceding entry and is not fully contained by that entry.\n   300→\t */\n   301→\tpublic static sanitizeAndMerge(\n   302→\t\trangesA: FoldingRegions | FoldRange[],\n   303→\t\trangesB: FoldingRegions | FoldRange[],\n   304→\t\tmaxLineNumber: number | undefined,\n   305→\t\tselection?: SelectedLines\n   306→\t): FoldRange[] {\n   307→\n   308→\t\tmaxLineNumber = maxLineNumber ?? The user folded B set takes precedence and we sometimes need to look\n   353→\t\t\t\t// ahead in it to check for an upcoming conflict.\n   354→\t\t\t\tlet scanIndex = indexB;\n   355→\t\t\t\tlet prescanB = nextB;\n   356→\t\t\t\twhile (true) {\n   357→\t\t\t\t\tif (!prescanB || prescanB.startLineNumber > nextA!.endLineNumber) {\n   358→\t\t\t\t\t\tuseRange = nextA;\n   359→\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak; a user folded range, it wins\n   363→\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak; // without setting nextResult, so this nextA gets skipped\n   364→\t\t\t\t\t}\n   365→\t\t\t\t\tprescanB = getB(++scanIndex);\n   366→\t\t\t\t}\n   367→\t\t\t\tnextA = getA(++indexA);\n   368→\t\t\t}\n   369→\n   370→\t\t\tif (useRange) {\n   371→\t\t\t\twhile (topStackedRange\n   372→\t\t\t\t\t&& topStackedRange.endLineNumber < resultRanges;\n   391→\t}\n   392→\n   393→}\n   394→\n   395→export class FoldingRegion {\n   396→\n   397→\tconstructor(private readonly ranges: FoldingRegions, private index: number) {\n 420→\tcontainedBy(range: ILineRange): boolean {\n   421→\t\treturn range.startLineNumber <= this.startLineNumber && range.endLineNumber >= this.endLineNumber;\n   422→\t}\n 427→\t\treturn this.startLineNumber < lineNumber && lineNumber <= this.endLineNumber;\n   428→\t}\n   429→}\n   430→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it {\n\t\tif (!this._parentsComputed) {\n\t\t\tthis._parentsComputed = true;\n\t\t\tconst parentIndexes: number[] = [];\n\t\t\tconst isInsideLast = (startLineNumber: number, endLineNumber: number) => endLineNumber;\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tfor (let i = 0, len = this._startIndexes.length; i < len; i++) {\n\t\t\t\tconst startLineNumber = this._startIndexes[i];\n\t\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = this._endIndexes[i];\n\t\t\t\tif (startLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER || endLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('startLineNumber or endLineNumber must not exceed ' + MAX_LINE_NUMBER);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\twhile (parentIndexes.length > 0 && !isInsideLast(startLineNumber, endLineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\t\tparentIndexes.pop();\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tconst parentIndex = parentIndexes.length > 0 ? parentIndexes[parentIndexes.length - 1] : -1;\n\t\t\t\tparentIndexes.push(i);\n\t\t\t\tthis._startIndexes[i] = startLineNumber + ((parentIndex & 0xFF) << 24);\n\t\t\t\tthis._endIndexes[i] = endLineNumber + ((parentIndex & 0xFF00) << 16);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpublic get length(): number {\n\t\treturn this._startIndexes.length;\n\t}\n\n\tpublic MAX_LINE_NUMBER;\n\t}\n\n\tpublic getType(index: number): string | undefined {\n\t\treturn this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined;\n\t}\n\n\tpublic hasTypes() {\n\t\treturn !!this._types;\n\t}\n\n\tpublic isCollapsed(index: number): boolean {\n\t\treturn this._collapseStates.get(index);\n\t}\n\n\tpublic setCollapsed(index: number, newState: boolean) {\n\t\tthis._collapseStates.set(index, newState);\n\t}\n\n\tprivate isUserDefined(index: number): boolean {\n\t\treturn this._userDefinedStates.get(index);\n\t}\n\n\tprivate setUserDefined(index: number, newState: boolean) {\n\t\treturn this._userDefinedStates.set(index, newState);\n\t}\n\n\tprivate isRecovered(index: number): boolean {\n\t\treturn this._recoveredStates.get(index);\n\t}\n\n\tprivate setRecovered(index: number, newState: boolean) {\n\t\treturn this._recoveredStates.set(index, newState);\n\t}\n\n\tpublic getSource(index: number): true);\n\t\t\tthis.setRecovered(index, false);\n\t\t} else if (source === FoldSource.recovered) {\n\t\t\tthis.setUserDefined(index, false);\n\t\t\tthis.setRecovered(index, true);\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tthis.setUserDefined(index, false);\n\t\t\tthis.setRecovered(index, false);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpublic setCollapsedAllOfType(type: string, newState: boolean) {\n\t\tlet hasChanged = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn hasChanged;\n\t}\n\n\tpublic toRegion(index: number): FoldingRegion {\n\t\treturn new FoldingRegion(this, index);\n\t}\n\n\tpublic getParentIndex(index: this.getEndLineNumber(index) >= line;\n\t}\n\n\tprivate findIndex(line: number) {\n\t\tlet low = 0, high = this._startIndexes.length;\n\t\tif (high === 0) {\n\t\t\treturn -1; // no 117→\tendAbove: number; // end line number for the region above\n   118→\tline: number; // start line of the region. 1];\n   143→\t\tif (indent === -1) {\n   144→\t\t\tif (offSide) {\n   145→\t\t\t\t// for offSide languages, empty lines are associated to the previous block\n   146→\t\t\t\t// note: the next block is already written to the results, so this only\n   147→\t\t\t\t// impacts the end position of the block before\n   148→\t\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   149→\t\t\t}\n   150→\t\t\tcontinue; // only whitespace\n   151→\t\t}\n   152→\t\tlet m;\n   153→\t\tif (pattern && (m = lineContent.match(pattern))) {\n   154→\t\t\t// folding pattern match\n   155→\t\t\tif (m[1]) { // start pattern match\n   156→\t\t\t\t// discard all regions until the folding pattern\n   157→\t\t\t\tlet i = previousRegions.length - 1;\n   158→\t\t\t\twhile (i > 0 && previousRegions[i].indent !== -2) {\n   159→\t\t\t\t\ti--;\n   160→\t\t\t\t}\n   161→\t\t\t\tif (i > 0) {\n   162→\t\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.length = i + 1;\n   163→\t\t\t\t\tprevious = previousRegions[i];\n   164→\n   165→\t\t\t\t\t// new folding range from pattern, includes the end line\n   166→\t\t\t\t\tresult.insertFirst(line, previous.line, indent);\n   167→\t\t\t\t\tprevious.line = line;\n   168→\t\t\t\t\tprevious.indent = indent;\n   169→\t\t\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   170→\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   171→\t\t\t\t} else {\n   172→\t\t\t\t\t// no end marker found, treat line as a regular line\n   173→\t\t\t\t}\n   174→\t\t\t} else { // end pattern match\n   175→\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent: -2, endAbove: line, line });\n   176→\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n   177→\t\t\t}\n   178→\t\t}\n   179→\t\tif (previous.indent > indent) {\n   180→\t\t\t// discard all regions with larger indent\n   181→\t\t\tdo {\n   182→\t\t\t\tpreviousRegions.pop();\n   183→\t\t\t\tprevious = previousRegions[previousRegions.length - 1];\n   184→\t\t\t} while (previous.indent > indent);\n   185→\n   186→\t\t\t// new folding range\n   187→\t\t\tconst endLineNumber = previous.endAbove - 1;\n   188→\t\t\tif (endLineNumber - line >= 1) { // needs at east size 1\n   189→\t\t\t\tresult.insertFirst(line, endLineNumber, indent);\n   190→\t\t\t}\n   191→\t\t}\n   192→\t\tif (previous.indent === indent) {\n   193→\t\t\tprevious.endAbove = line;\n   194→\t\t} else { // previous.indent < indent\n   195→\t\t\t// new region with a bigger indent\n   196→\t\t\tpreviousRegions.push({ indent, endAbove: line, line });\n   197→\t\t}\n   198→\t}\n   199→\treturn result.toIndentRanges(model);\n   200→}\n   201→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. RangeProvider Interface and Implementations\n\n#### RangeProvider Interface Definition\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts` (lines 48-52)\n\n```typescript\nexport interface RangeProvider {\n  readonly id: string;\n  compute(cancelationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions | null>;\n  dispose(): void;\n}\n```\n\n**Key Points:**\n- Each provider has a unique `id` (e.g., 'indent', 'syntax')\n- The `compute()` method returns a Promise that resolves to `FoldingRegions`\n- Must properly implement `dispose()` for cleanup\n\n#### Implementation 1: IndentRangeProvider\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 18-35)\n\n```typescript\nexport class IndentRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n  readonly id = ID_INDENT_PROVIDER;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n    private readonly languageConfigurationService: ILanguageConfigurationService,\n    private readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter\n  ) { }\n\n  dispose() { }\n\n  compute(cancelationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions> {\n    const foldingRules = this.languageConfigurationService.getLanguageConfiguration(\n      this.editorModel.getLanguageId()\n    ).foldingRules;\n    const offSide = foldingRules && !!foldingRules.offSide;\n    const markers = foldingRules && foldingRules.markers;\n    return Promise.resolve(computeRanges(this.editorModel, offSide, markers, this.foldingRangesLimit));\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Implementation 2: SyntaxRangeProvider\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/syntaxRangeProvider.ts` (lines 23-61)\n\n```typescript\nexport class SyntaxRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n  readonly id = ID_SYNTAX_PROVIDER;\n  readonly disposables: DisposableStore;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n    private readonly providers: FoldingRangeProvider[],\n    readonly handleFoldingRangesChange: () => void,\n    private readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter,\n    private readonly fallbackRangeProvider: RangeProvider | undefined\n  ) {\n    this.disposables = new DisposableStore();\n    if (fallbackRangeProvider) {\n      this.disposables.add(fallbackRangeProvider);\n    }\n\n    for (const provider of providers) {\n      if (typeof provider.onDidChange === 'function') {\n        this.disposables.add(provider.onDidChange(handleFoldingRangesChange));\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  compute(cancellationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions | null> {\n    return collectSyntaxRanges(this.providers, this.editorModel, cancellationToken)\n      .then(ranges => {\n        if (ranges) {\n          const res = sanitizeRanges(ranges, this.foldingRangesLimit);\n          return res;\n        }\n        return this.fallbackRangeProvider?.compute(cancellationToken) ?? null;\n      });\n  }\n\n  dispose() {\n    this.disposables.dispose();\n  }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. How RangeProviders Compute and Return FoldingRegions\n\n#### FoldingRegions Class\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/foldingRanges.ts` (lines 63-84)\n\n```typescript\nexport class FoldingRegions {\n  private readonly _startIndexes: Uint32Array;\n  private readonly _endIndexes: Uint32Array;\n  private readonly _collapseStates: BitField;\n  private readonly _userDefinedStates: BitField;\n  private readonly _recoveredStates: BitField;\n  private _parentsComputed: boolean;\n  private readonly _types: Array<string | undefined> | undefined;\n\n  constructor(startIndexes: Uint32Array, endIndexes: Uint32Array, types?: Array<string | undefined>) {\n    if (startIndexes.length !== endIndexes.length || startIndexes.length > MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS) {\n      throw new Error('invalid startIndexes or endIndexes size');\n    }\n    this._startIndexes = startIndexes;\n    this._endIndexes = endIndexes;\n    this._collapseStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    this._userDefinedStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    this._recoveredStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    this._types = types;\n    this._parentsComputed = false;\n  }\n  \n  // Key methods for accessing regions:\n  public getStartLineNumber(index: number): number {\n    return this._startIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER;\n  }\n\n  public getEndLineNumber(index: number): number {\n    return this._endIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER;\n  }\n\n  public getType(index: number): string | undefined {\n    return this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined;\n  }\n  \n  public toFoldRange(index: number): FoldRange {\n    return {\n      startLineNumber: this._startIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER,\n      endLineNumber: this._endIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER,\n      type: this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined,\n      isCollapsed: this.isCollapsed(index),\n      source: this.getSource(index)\n    };\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Creating FoldingRegions\n```typescript\n// From indentRangeProvider.ts (lines 66-78)\npublic toIndentRanges(model: ITextModel) {\n  const limit = this._foldingRangesLimit.limit;\n  const startIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n  const endIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n  for (let i = this._length - 1, k = 0; i >= 0; i--, k++) {\n    startIndexes[k] = this._startIndexes[i];\n    endIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n  }\n  return new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. Comment-Based Markers and Region Detection\n\n#### FoldingMarkers Pattern\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 126-133)\n\n```typescript\nexport function computeRanges(\n  model: ITextModel,\n  offSide: boolean,\n  markers?: FoldingMarkers,\n  foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter = foldingRangesLimitDefault\n): FoldingRegions {\n  const tabSize = model.getOptions().tabSize;\n  const result = new RangesCollector(foldingRangesLimit);\n\n  let pattern: RegExp | undefined = undefined;\n  if (markers) {\n    pattern = new RegExp(`(${markers.start.source})|(?:${markers.end.source})`);\n  }\n```\n\n#### Test Example of Markers\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/test/browser/indentRangeProvider.test.ts` (lines 150-152)\n\n```typescript\nconst markers: FoldingMarkers = {\n  start: /^\\s*#region\\b/,\n  end: /^\\s*#endregion\\b/\n};\n```\n\n#### Marker Detection Logic\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 152-177)\n\n```typescript\nlet m;\nif (pattern && (m = lineContent.match(pattern))) {\n  // folding pattern match\n  if (m[1]) { // start pattern match\n    // discard all regions until the folding pattern\n    let i = previousRegions.length - 1;\n    while (i > 0 && previousRegions[i].indent !== -2) {\n      i--;\n    }\n    if (i > 0) {\n      previousRegions.length = i + 1;\n      previous = previousRegions[i];\n\n      // new folding range from pattern, includes the end line\n      result.insertFirst(line, previous.line, indent);\n      previous.line = line;\n      previous.indent = indent;\n      previous.endAbove = line;\n      continue;\n    }\n  } else { // end pattern match\n    previousRegions.push({ indent: -2, endAbove: line, line });\n    continue;\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Getting Line Content for Region Names\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 139-141)\n\n```typescript\nfor (let line = model.getLineCount(); line > 0; line--) {\n  const lineContent = model.getLineContent(line);\n  const indent = computeIndentLevel(lineContent, tabSize);\n```\n\nTo extract a region name from a line like `// #region MyRegionName`, use:\n```typescript\nconst lineContent = model.getLineContent(lineNumber);\nconst match = lineContent.match(/^[\\s]*.*#region\\s+(.+)$/);\nconst regionName = match ? match[1] : 'unnamed';\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. Editor Commands Registration Pattern\n\n#### FoldingAction Base Class\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts` (lines 544-583)\n\n```typescript\nabstract class FoldingAction<T> extends EditorAction {\n\n  abstract invoke(\n    foldingController: FoldingController,\n    foldingModel: FoldingModel,\n    editor: ICodeEditor,\n    args: T,\n    languageConfigurationService: ILanguageConfigurationService\n  ): void;\n\n  public override runEditorCommand(accessor: ServicesAccessor, editor: ICodeEditor, args: T): void | Promise<void> {\n    const languageConfigurationService = accessor.get(ILanguageConfigurationService);\n    const foldingController = FoldingController.get(editor);\n    if (!foldingController) {\n      return;\n    }\n    const foldingModelPromise = foldingController.getFoldingModel();\n    if (foldingModelPromise) {\n      this.reportTelemetry(accessor, editor);\n      return foldingModelPromise.then(foldingModel => {\n        if (foldingModel) {\n          this.invoke(foldingController, foldingModel, editor, args, languageConfigurationService);\n          const selection = editor.getSelection();\n          if (selection) {\n            foldingController.reveal(selection.getStartPosition());\n          }\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  protected getSelectedLines(editor: ICodeEditor) {\n    const selections = editor.getSelections();\n    return selections ? selections.map(s => s.startLineNumber) : [];\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Concrete Action Example: GotoParentFoldAction\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts` (lines 1046-1073)\n\n```typescript\nclass GotoParentFoldAction extends FoldingAction<void> {\n  constructor() {\n    super({\n      id: this._getMatchingResult(notebook);\n  const { selected, all } = matchResult;\n\n  let newKernel: INotebookKernel | undefined;\n  if (wantedId) {\n    for (const candidate of all) {\n      if '{0}'\", this._labelService.getUriLabel(notebook.uri, { relative: true }));\n\n  quickPick.busy = this._notebookKernelService.getKernelDetectionTasks(notebook).length > 0;\n\n  const });\n\n  // Listen for updates\n  const kernelChangeEventListener = Event.debounce<void, void>(\n    Event.any(\n      this._notebookKernelService.onDidChangeSourceActions,\n      this._notebookKernelService.onDidAddKernel,\n      this._notebookKernelService.onDidRemoveKernel,\n      this._notebookKernelService.onDidChangeNotebookAffinity\n    ),\n    (last, _current) => last,\n    KERNEL_PICKER_UPDATE_DEBOUNCE\n  )(async () => {\n    // Update items dynamically\n    quickPick.busy = false;\n    const currentActiveItems = quickPick.activeItems;\n    const matchResult = this._getMatchingResult(notebook);\n    const quickPickItems = this._getKernelPickerQuickPickItems(notebook, matchResult, this._notebookKernelService, scopedContextKeyService);\n    quickPick.keepScrollPosition = true;\n    quickPick.items = quickPickItems;\n    quickPick.activeItems = activeItems;\n  });\n\n  // Handle selection and dismissal\n  const pick = await new Promise<{ selected: KernelQuickPickItem | undefined; items: KernelQuickPickItem[] }>((resolve) => {\n    localDisposableStore.add(quickPick.onDidAccept(() => {\n      const item = quickPick.selectedItems[0];\n      resolve({ selected: item, items: quickPick.items as KernelQuickPickItem[] });\n      quickPick.hide();\n    }));\n\n    localDisposableStore.add(quickPick.onDidHide(() => {\n      kernelDetectionTaskListener.dispose();\n      kernelChangeEventListener.dispose();\n      resolve({ selected: undefined, items: quickPick.items as KernelQuickPickItem[] });\n    }));\n\n    quickPick.show();\n  });\n\n  localDisposableStore.dispose();\n\n  if (pick.selected) {\n    return await this._handleQuickPick(editor, pick.selected, pick.items);\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n```\n\n#### QuickPick Item Types\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/workbench/contrib/notebook/browser/viewParts/notebookKernelQuickPickStrategy.ts` (lines 38-67)\n\n```typescript\ntype RangeProvider Interface and Implementations\n\n#### RangeProvider Interface Definition\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts` (lines 48-52)\n\n```typescript\nexport interface RangeProvider {\n  readonly id: string;\n  compute(cancelationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions | null>;\n  dispose(): void;\n}\n```\n\n**Key Points:**\n- Each provider has a unique `id` (e.g., 'indent', 'syntax')\n- The `compute()` method returns a Promise that resolves to `FoldingRegions`\n- Must properly implement `dispose()` for cleanup\n\n#### Implementation 1: IndentRangeProvider\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 18-35)\n\n```typescript\nexport class IndentRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n  readonly id = ID_INDENT_PROVIDER;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n    private readonly languageConfigurationService: ILanguageConfigurationService,\n    private readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter\n  ) { }\n\n  dispose() { }\n\n  compute(cancelationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions> {\n    const foldingRules = this.languageConfigurationService.getLanguageConfiguration(\n      this.editorModel.getLanguageId()\n    ).foldingRules;\n    const offSide = foldingRules && !!foldingRules.offSide;\n    const markers = foldingRules && foldingRules.markers;\n    return Promise.resolve(computeRanges(this.editorModel, offSide, markers, this.foldingRangesLimit));\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Implementation 2: SyntaxRangeProvider\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/syntaxRangeProvider.ts` (lines 23-61)\n\n```typescript\nexport class SyntaxRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n  readonly id = ID_SYNTAX_PROVIDER;\n  readonly disposables: DisposableStore;\n\n  constructor(\n    private readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n    private readonly providers: FoldingRangeProvider[],\n    readonly handleFoldingRangesChange: () => void,\n    private readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter,\n    private readonly fallbackRangeProvider: RangeProvider | undefined\n  ) {\n    this.disposables = new DisposableStore();\n    if (fallbackRangeProvider) {\n      this.disposables.add(fallbackRangeProvider);\n    }\n\n    for (const provider of providers) {\n      if (typeof provider.onDidChange === 'function') {\n        this.disposables.add(provider.onDidChange(handleFoldingRangesChange));\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  compute(cancellationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions | null> {\n    return collectSyntaxRanges(this.providers, this.editorModel, cancellationToken)\n      .then(ranges => {\n        if (ranges) {\n          const res = sanitizeRanges(ranges, this.foldingRangesLimit);\n          return res;\n        }\n        return this.fallbackRangeProvider?.compute(cancellationToken) ?? null;\n      });\n  }\n\n  dispose() {\n    this.disposables.dispose();\n  }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. How RangeProviders Compute and Return FoldingRegions\n\n#### FoldingRegions Class\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/foldingRanges.ts` (lines 63-84)\n\n```typescript\nexport class FoldingRegions {\n  private readonly _startIndexes: Uint32Array;\n  private readonly _endIndexes: Uint32Array;\n  private readonly _collapseStates: BitField;\n  private readonly _userDefinedStates: BitField;\n  private readonly _recoveredStates: BitField;\n  private _parentsComputed: boolean;\n  private readonly _types: Array<string | undefined> | undefined;\n\n  constructor(startIndexes: Uint32Array, endIndexes: Uint32Array, types?: Array<string | undefined>) {\n    if (startIndexes.length !== endIndexes.length || startIndexes.length > MAX_FOLDING_REGIONS) {\n      throw new Error('invalid startIndexes or endIndexes size');\n    }\n    this._startIndexes = startIndexes;\n    this._endIndexes = endIndexes;\n    this._collapseStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    this._userDefinedStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    this._recoveredStates = new BitField(startIndexes.length);\n    this._types = types;\n    this._parentsComputed = false;\n  }\n  \n  // Key methods for accessing regions:\n  public getStartLineNumber(index: number): number {\n    return this._startIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER;\n  }\n\n  public getEndLineNumber(index: number): number {\n    return this._endIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER;\n  }\n\n  public getType(index: number): string | undefined {\n    return this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined;\n  }\n  \n  public toFoldRange(index: number): FoldRange {\n    return {\n      startLineNumber: this._startIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER,\n      endLineNumber: this._endIndexes[index] & MAX_LINE_NUMBER,\n      type: this._types ? this._types[index] : undefined,\n      isCollapsed: this.isCollapsed(index),\n      source: this.getSource(index)\n    };\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Creating FoldingRegions\n```typescript\n// From indentRangeProvider.ts (lines 66-78)\npublic toIndentRanges(model: ITextModel) {\n  const limit = this._foldingRangesLimit.limit;\n  const startIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n  const endIndexes = new Uint32Array(this._length);\n  for (let i = this._length - 1, k = 0; i >= 0; i--, k++) {\n    startIndexes[k] = this._startIndexes[i];\n    endIndexes[k] = this._endIndexes[i];\n  }\n  return new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. Comment-Based Markers and Region Detection\n\n#### FoldingMarkers Pattern\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 126-133)\n\n```typescript\nexport function computeRanges(\n  model: ITextModel,\n  offSide: boolean,\n  markers?: FoldingMarkers,\n  foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter = foldingRangesLimitDefault\n): FoldingRegions {\n  const tabSize = model.getOptions().tabSize;\n  const result = new RangesCollector(foldingRangesLimit);\n\n  let pattern: RegExp | undefined = undefined;\n  if (markers) {\n    pattern = new RegExp(`(${markers.start.source})|(?:${markers.end.source})`);\n  }\n```\n\n#### Test Example of Markers\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/test/browser/indentRangeProvider.test.ts` (lines 150-152)\n\n```typescript\nconst markers: FoldingMarkers = {\n  start: /^\\s*#region\\b/,\n  end: /^\\s*#endregion\\b/\n};\n```\n\n#### Marker Detection Logic\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 152-177)\n\n```typescript\nlet m;\nif (pattern && (m = lineContent.match(pattern))) {\n  // folding pattern match\n  if (m[1]) { // start pattern match\n    // discard all regions until the folding pattern\n    let i = previousRegions.length - 1;\n    while (i > 0 && previousRegions[i].indent !== -2) {\n      i--;\n    }\n    if (i > 0) {\n      previousRegions.length = i + 1;\n      previous = previousRegions[i];\n\n      // new folding range from pattern, includes the end line\n      result.insertFirst(line, previous.line, indent);\n      previous.line = line;\n      previous.indent = indent;\n      previous.endAbove = line;\n      continue;\n    }\n  } else { // end pattern match\n    previousRegions.push({ indent: -2, endAbove: line, line });\n    continue;\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Getting Line Content for Region Names\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/indentRangeProvider.ts` (lines 139-141)\n\n```typescript\nfor (let line = model.getLineCount(); line > 0; line--) {\n  const lineContent = model.getLineContent(line);\n  const indent = computeIndentLevel(lineContent, tabSize);\n```\n\nTo extract a region name from a line like `// #region MyRegionName`, use:\n```typescript\nconst lineContent = model.getLineContent(lineNumber);\nconst match = lineContent.match(/^[\\s]*.*#region\\s+(.+)$/);\nconst regionName = match ? match[1] : 'unnamed';\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. Editor Commands Registration Pattern\n\n#### FoldingAction Base Class\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts` (lines 544-583)\n\n```typescript\nabstract class FoldingAction<T> extends EditorAction {\n\n  abstract invoke(\n    foldingController: FoldingController,\n    foldingModel: FoldingModel,\n    editor: ICodeEditor,\n    args: T,\n    languageConfigurationService: ILanguageConfigurationService\n  ): void;\n\n  public override runEditorCommand(accessor: ServicesAccessor, editor: ICodeEditor, args: T): void | Promise<void> {\n    const languageConfigurationService = accessor.get(ILanguageConfigurationService);\n    const foldingController = FoldingController.get(editor);\n    if (!foldingController) {\n      return;\n    }\n    const foldingModelPromise = foldingController.getFoldingModel();\n    if (foldingModelPromise) {\n      this.reportTelemetry(accessor, editor);\n      return foldingModelPromise.then(foldingModel => {\n        if (foldingModel) {\n          this.invoke(foldingController, foldingModel, editor, args, languageConfigurationService);\n          const selection = editor.getSelection();\n          if (selection) {\n            foldingController.reveal(selection.getStartPosition());\n          }\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  protected getSelectedLines(editor: ICodeEditor) {\n    const selections = editor.getSelections();\n    return selections ? selections.map(s => s.startLineNumber) : [];\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### Concrete Action Example: GotoParentFoldAction\n**File:** = this._getMatchingResult(notebook);\n    const quickPickItems = this._getKernelPickerQuickPickItems(notebook, matchResult, this._notebookKernelService, scopedContextKeyService);\n    quickPick.keepScrollPosition = true;\n    quickPick.items = quickPickItems;\n    quickPick.activeItems = activeItems;\n  });\n\n  // Handle selection and dismissal\n  const pick = await new Promise<{ selected: KernelQuickPickItem | undefined; items: KernelQuickPickItem[] }>((resolve) => {\n    localDisposableStore.add(quickPick.onDidAccept(() => {\n      const item = quickPick.selectedItems[0];\n      resolve({ selected: item, items: quickPick.items as KernelQuickPickItem[] });\n      quickPick.hide();\n    }));\n\n    localDisposableStore.add(quickPick.onDidHide(() => {\n      kernelDetectionTaskListener.dispose();\n      kernelChangeEventListener.dispose();\n      resolve({ selected: undefined, items: quickPick.items as KernelQuickPickItem[] });\n    }));\n\n    quickPick.show();\n  });\n\n  localDisposableStore.dispose();\n\n  if (pick.selected) {\n    return await this._handleQuickPick(editor, pick.selected, pick.items);\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n```\n\n#### QuickPick Item Types\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/workbench/contrib/notebook/browser/viewParts/notebookKernelQuickPickStrategy.ts` (lines 38-67)\n\n```typescript\ntype KernelPick = IQuickPickItem & { kernel: INotebookKernel };\ntype GroupedKernelsPick = IQuickPickItem & { kernels: INotebookKernel[]; source: string };\ntype SourcePick = IQuickPickItem & { action: ISourceAction };\ntype InstallExtensionPick = IQuickPickItem & { extensionIds: string[] };\ntype SearchMarketplacePick = IQuickPickItem & { id: 'install' };\n\ntype KernelQuickPickItem = \n  (IQuickPickItem & { autoRun?: boolean }) \n  | SearchMarketplacePick \n  | InstallExtensionPick \n  | KernelPick \n  | GroupedKernelsPick \n  | SourcePick;\n```\n\n#### Building QuickPick Items for Named Regions\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/workbench/contrib/notebook/browser/viewParts/notebookKernelQuickPickStrategy.ts` (lines 455-484)\n\n```typescript\nprotected _getKernelPickerQuickPickItems(\n  notebookTextModel: NotebookTextModel,\n  matchResult: INotebookKernelMatchResult,\n  notebookKernelService: INotebookKernelService,\n  scopedContextKeyService: IContextKeyService\n): QuickPickInput<KernelQuickPickItem>[] {\n  const quickPickItems: QuickPickInput<KernelQuickPickItem>[] = [];\n\n  if (matchResult.selected) {\n    const kernelItem = toKernelQuickPick(matchResult.selected, matchResult.selected);\n    quickPickItems.push(kernelItem);\n  }\n\n  matchResult.suggestions\n    .filter(kernel => kernel.id !== matchResult.selected?.id)\n    .map(kernel => toKernelQuickPick(kernel, matchResult.selected))\n    .forEach(kernel => {\n      quickPickItems.push(kernel);\n    });\n\n  const shouldAutoRun = quickPickItems.length === 0;\n\n  if (quickPickItems.length > 0) {\n    quickPickItems.push({\n      type: 'separator'\n    });\n  }\n\n  // select another kernel quick pick\n  quickPickItems.push({\n    id: 'selectAnother',\n    label: localize('selectAnotherKernel.more', \"Select Another Kernel...\"),\n    autoRun: shouldAutoRun\n  });\n\n  return quickPickItems;\n}\n```\n\n#### IQuickInputService Dependency Injection\n```typescript\n@IQuickInputService _quickInputService: IQuickInputService\n\n// Or in EditorAction:\nconst accessor: ServicesAccessor  // get from runEditorCommand\n```\n\n---\n\n### 6. Key FoldingModel Methods for Navigation\n\n**File:** `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/foldingModel.ts`\n\n```typescript\nexport class FoldingModel {\n  public get regions(): FoldingRegions { return this._regions; }\n  \n  // Access individual regions\n  public getRegion(index: number): FoldingRegion {\n    return this.regions.toRegion(index);\n  }\n  \n  // Toggle collapse state\n  public toggleCollapseState(toggledRegions: FoldingRegion[]) { ... }\n}\n\n// FoldingRegions methods useful for navigation:\npublic getStartLineNumber(index: number): number { ... }\npublic getEndLineNumber(index: number): number { ... }\npublic getType(index: number): string | undefined { ... }\npublic getParentIndex(index: number): number { ... }\npublic contains(index: number, line: number): boolean { ... }\npublic findRange(line: number): number { ... }  // Find region containing line\n```\n\n---\n\n### Summary for Named Region Provider Implementation\n\nTo implement a named region provider, you would:\n\n1. **Create a class implementing RangeProvider** with markers like `/^.*#region\\s+(.+)$/`\n2. **Parse region names** from matching lines using regex\n3. **Store region metadata** including start/end lines and names\n4. **Return FoldingRegions** with type information set to region names\n5. **Register as EditorAction** to create a command that shows quick-pick with region names\n6. **Use IQuickInputService** to display regions and navigate on selection\n7. **Use FoldingController.reveal()** to scroll to selected region\n8. **Handle collapse/expand** via FoldingModel.toggleCollapseState()\n\nAll code examples are from the VS Code repository at `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/` and related files."}],"totalDurationMs":72628,"totalTokens":72490,"totalToolUseCount":26,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":205,"cache_read_input_tokens":66165,"output_tokens":6120,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":205,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}}}

Create Named Region Range Provider\n**File:** Create `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts`\n\n- Implement `RangeProvider` interface similar to `IndentRangeProvider`\n- Use regex pattern to detect `#region` and `#endregion` markers: `/^[\\s]*.*#region\\s+(.+)$/`\n- Extract region names from matched lines\n- Store metadata: region name → (startLine, endLine)\n- Create FoldingRegions with region names as type information\n- Return empty FoldingRegions if no named regions found (doesn't block other providers)\n\n**Key class:** `NamedRegionRangeProvider implements RangeProvider`\n- Constructor takes: `ITextModel`, `FoldingLimitReporter`\n- `compute()` method:\n  - Iterate through all lines scanning for `#region` markers\n  - Track start/end pairs\n  - Extract name from marker comment\n  - Build and return FoldingRegions\n\n### 2. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01J9p6Cbg2oJK7SiB3JEmYu8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QH1WwndYkJeqiFTzX7TQVY","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts","content":"/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *  Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n *  Licensed under the MIT License. See License.txt in the project root for license information.\n *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\nimport { CancellationToken } from '../../../../base/common/cancellation.js';\nimport { ITextModel } from '../../../common/model.js';\nimport { FoldingRegions, MAX_LINE_NUMBER } from './foldingRanges.js';\nimport { FoldingLimitReporter, RangeProvider } from './folding.js';\n\nconst ID_NAMED_REGION_PROVIDER = 'namedRegion';\n\nexport interface NamedRegion {\n\tname: string;\n\tstartLineNumber: number;\n\tendLineNumber: number;\n}\n\nexport class NamedRegionRangeProvider implements RangeProvider {\n\treadonly id = ID_NAMED_REGION_PROVIDER;\n\n\tprivate namedRegions: NamedRegion[] = [];\n\n\tconstructor(\n\t\tprivate readonly editorModel: ITextModel,\n\t\tprivate readonly foldingRangesLimit: FoldingLimitReporter\n\t) { }\n\n\tdispose() { }\n\n\tcompute(cancelationToken: CancellationToken): Promise<FoldingRegions | null> {\n\t\treturn Promise.resolve(this.computeNamedRegions());\n\t}\n\n\tprivate computeNamedRegions(): FoldingRegions | null {\n\t\tconst lines = this.editorModel.getLineCount();\n\t\tthis.namedRegions = [];\n\n\t\t// Stack to track open regions\n\t\tconst regionStack: Array<{ startLine: number; name: string }> = [];\n\n\t\t// Regex to detect #region markers with optional whitespace and comments\n\t\tconst regionStartPattern = /^[\\s]*(?:\\/\\/|#|\\/\\*|\\*|--)\\s*#region\\s+(.+?)(?:\\s*(?:\\*\\/|$))?/;\n\t\tconst regionEndPattern = /^[\\s]*(?:\\/\\/|#|\\/\\*|\\*|--)\\s*#endregion/;\n\n\t\tfor (let lineNumber = 1; lineNumber <= lines; lineNumber++) {\n\t\t\tconst lineContent = this.editorModel.getLineContent(lineNumber);\n\n\t\t\t// Check for region start\n\t\t\tconst startMatch = lineContent.match(regionStartPattern);\n\t\t\tif (startMatch) {\n\t\t\t\tconst name = startMatch[1].trim();\n\t\t\t\tregionStack.push({ startLine: lineNumber, name });\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Check for region end\n\t\t\tif (regionEndPattern.test(lineContent)) {\n\t\t\t\tif (regionStack.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst region = regionStack.pop();\n\t\t\t\t\tif (region) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.namedRegions.push({\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname: region.name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: region.startLine,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: lineNumber\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Handle unclosed regions by closing them at end of file\n\t\twhile (regionStack.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tconst region = regionStack.pop();\n\t\t\tif (region) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.namedRegions.push({\n\t\t\t\t\tname: region.name,\n\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: region.startLine,\n\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: lines\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Sort by start line number\n\t\tthis.namedRegions.sort((a, b) => a.startLineNumber - b.startLineNumber);\n\n\t\t// Convert to FoldingRegions format\n\t\treturn this.createFoldingRegions();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate createFoldingRegions(): FoldingRegions | null {\n\t\tif (this.namedRegions.length === 0) {\n\t\t\treturn null;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst limit = this.foldingRangesLimit.limit;\n\t\tconst regionsToUse = this.namedRegions.slice(0, limit);\n\n\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(regionsToUse.length);\n\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(regionsToUse.length);\n\t\tconst types: Array<string | undefined> = [];\n\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < regionsToUse.length; i++) {\n\t\t\tconst region = regionsToUse[i];\n\t\t\tif (region.startLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER || region.endLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tstartIndexes[i] = region.startLineNumber;\n\t\t\tendIndexes[i] = region.endLineNumber;\n\t\t\ttypes[i] = `namedRegion:${region.name}`;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (startIndexes.length === 0) {\n\t\t\treturn null;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tthis.foldingRangesLimit.update(this.namedRegions.length, this.namedRegions.length > limit ? limit : false);\n\n\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes, types);\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Returns the list of named regions found in the document.\n\t * This is used for navigation via quick-pick menu.\n\t */\n\tpublic getNamedRegions(): NamedRegion[] {\n\t\treturn this.namedRegions;\n\t}\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":8,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1938,"cache_read_input_tokens":56870,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1938},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"eea02bda-4a43-4c53-a319-adc25647376a","uuid":"d98d1859-8e22-4777-aa14-235405d30ab1"}

name: string }> = [];\n\n\t\t// Regex to detect #region markers with optional whitespace and comments\n\t\tconst regionStartPattern = /^[\\s]*(?:\\/\\/|#|\\/\\*|\\*|--)\\s*#region\\s+(.+?)(?:\\s*(?:\\*\\/|$))?/;\n\t\tconst regionEndPattern = /^[\\s]*(?:\\/\\/|#|\\/\\*|\\*|--)\\s*#endregion/;\n\n\t\tfor (let lineNumber = 1; lineNumber <= lines; lineNumber++) {\n\t\t\tconst lineContent = this.editorModel.getLineContent(lineNumber);\n\n\t\t\t// Check for region start\n\t\t\tconst startMatch = lineContent.match(regionStartPattern);\n\t\t\tif (startMatch) {\n\t\t\t\tconst name = startMatch[1].trim();\n\t\t\t\tregionStack.push({ startLine: lineNumber, name });\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Check for region end\n\t\t\tif (regionEndPattern.test(lineContent)) {\n\t\t\t\tif (regionStack.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst region = regionStack.pop();\n\t\t\t\t\tif (region) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.namedRegions.push({\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname: region.name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: region.startLine,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: lineNumber\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Handle unclosed regions by closing them at end of file\n\t\twhile (regionStack.length > 0) {\n\t\t\tconst region = regionStack.pop();\n\t\t\tif (region) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.namedRegions.push({\n\t\t\t\t\tname: region.name,\n\t\t\t\t\tstartLineNumber: region.startLine,\n\t\t\t\t\tendLineNumber: lines\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Sort by start line number\n\t\tthis.namedRegions.sort((a, b) => a.startLineNumber - b.startLineNumber);\n\n\t\t// Convert to FoldingRegions format\n\t\treturn this.createFoldingRegions();\n\t}\n\n\tprivate createFoldingRegions(): FoldingRegions | null {\n\t\tif (this.namedRegions.length === 0) {\n\t\t\treturn null;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst limit = this.foldingRangesLimit.limit;\n\t\tconst regionsToUse = this.namedRegions.slice(0, limit);\n\n\t\tconst startIndexes = new Uint32Array(regionsToUse.length);\n\t\tconst endIndexes = new Uint32Array(regionsToUse.length);\n\t\tconst types: Array<string | undefined> = [];\n\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < regionsToUse.length; i++) {\n\t\t\tconst region = regionsToUse[i];\n\t\t\tif (region.startLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER || region.endLineNumber > MAX_LINE_NUMBER) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tstartIndexes[i] = region.startLineNumber;\n\t\t\tendIndexes[i] = region.endLineNumber;\n\t\t\ttypes[i] = `namedRegion:${region.name}`;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (startIndexes.length === 0) {\n\t\t\treturn null;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tthis.foldingRangesLimit.update(this.namedRegions.length, this.namedRegions.length > limit ? limit : false);\n\n\t\treturn new FoldingRegions(startIndexes, endIndexes, types);\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Returns the list of named regions found in the document.\n\t * This is used for navigation via quick-pick menu.\n\t */\n\tpublic getNamedRegions(): NamedRegion[] {\n\t\treturn this.namedRegions;\n\t}\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{\n\t\t\tcase MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS: {\n\t\t\t\tconst data = e.target.detail;\n\t\t\t\tconst offsetLeftInGutter = e.target.element!.offsetLeft;\n\t\t\t\tconst gutterOffsetX = {\n\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\tif (!model || range.startColumn !== model.getLineMaxColumn(lineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst region = {\n\t\t\t\tconst surrounding = e.event.altKey;\n\t\t\t\tlet toToggle = [];\n\t\t\t\tif (surrounding) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst filter = (otherRegion: FoldingRegion) => !otherRegion.containedBy(region) && !region.containedBy(otherRegion);\n\t\t\t\t\tconst toMaybeToggle = foldingModel.getRegionsInside(null, filter);\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of toMaybeToggle) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// if any surrounding regions are folded, unfold those. Otherwise, fold all surrounding\n\t\t\t\t\tif (toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle = toMaybeToggle;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst recursive = e.event.middleButton || e.event.shiftKey;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (recursive) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of foldingModel.getRegionsInside(region)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed === isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// when recursive, first only collapse all children. If all are already folded or there are no children, also fold parent.\n\t\t\t\t\tif (isCollapsed || !recursive || toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(region);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfoldingModel.toggleCollapseState(toToggle);\n\t\t\t\tthis.reveal({ lineNumber, column: 1 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpublic this.getFoldingModel();\n\t\tif (!foldingModel) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tfoldingModel.then(foldingModel => { // null is returned if folding got disabled in the meantime\n\t\t\tif (foldingModel) {\n\t\t\t\tconst selections = this.editor.getSelections();\n\t\t\t\tif (selections && selections.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst toToggle: FoldingRegion[] = [];\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const selection of {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(...foldingModel.getAllRegionsAtLine(lineNumber, r => r.isCollapsed && lineNumber > r.startLineNumber));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (toToggle.length) onUnexpectedError);\n\n\t}\n\n\tprivate onEditorMouseDown(e: IEditorMouseEvent): void {\n\t\tthis.mouseDownInfo = null;\n\n\n\t\tif (!this.hiddenRangeModel || !e.target || !e.target.range) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (!e.event.leftButton && !e.event.middleButton) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst range = e.target.range;\n\t\tlet iconClicked = false;\n\t\tswitch (e.target.type) {\n\t\t\tcase MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS: {\n\t\t\t\tconst data = e.target.detail;\n\t\t\t\tconst offsetLeftInGutter = e.target.element!.offsetLeft;\n\t\t\t\tconst gutterOffsetX = TODO@martin this is such that we don't collide with dirty diff\n\t\t\t\tif (gutterOffsetX < 4) { // the whitespace between the border and the real folding icon border is 4px\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\ticonClicked = true;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase MouseTargetType.CONTENT_EMPTY: {\n\t\t\t\tif (this._unfoldOnClickAfterEndOfLine && MouseTargetType.CONTENT_TEXT: {\n\t\t\t\tif (this.hiddenRangeModel.hasRanges()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\t\t\tif (model && range.startColumn === model.getLineMaxColumn(range.startLineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tthis.mouseDownInfo = { lineNumber: !e.target) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst lineNumber = this.mouseDownInfo.lineNumber;\n\t\tconst iconClicked = this.mouseDownInfo.iconClicked;\n\n\t\tconst range = e.target.range;\n\t\tif (!range || range.startLineNumber !== lineNumber) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (iconClicked) {\n\t\t\tif (e.target.type !== MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\tif (!model || range.startColumn !== model.getLineMaxColumn(lineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst region = foldingModel.getRegionAtLine(lineNumber);\n\t\tif (region && region.startLineNumber === lineNumber) {\n\t\t\tconst isCollapsed = region.isCollapsed;\n\t\t\tif (iconClicked || isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\tconst surrounding = e.event.altKey;\n\t\t\t\tlet toToggle = [];\n\t\t\t\tif (surrounding) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst filter = (otherRegion: FoldingRegion) => !otherRegion.containedBy(region) && !region.containedBy(otherRegion);\n\t\t\t\t\tconst toMaybeToggle = foldingModel.getRegionsInside(null, filter);\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of toMaybeToggle) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// if any surrounding regions are folded, unfold those. Otherwise, fold all surrounding\n\t\t\t\t\tif (toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle = toMaybeToggle;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst recursive = e.event.middleButton || e.event.shiftKey;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (recursive) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of foldingModel.getRegionsInside(region)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed === isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// when recursive, first only collapse all children. If all are already folded or there are no children, also fold parent.\n\t\t\t\t\tif (isCollapsed || !recursive || toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(region);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfoldingModel.toggleCollapseState(toToggle);\n\t\t\t\tthis.reveal({ lineNumber, column: 1 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpublic });","+      quickPick.onDidHide(() => {","+        resolve(undefined);","+        quickPick.dispose();","+      });","+      quickPick.show();","+    });","+","+    if (!picked) {","+ MouseTargetType.CONTENT_TEXT: {\n\t\t\t\tif (this.hiddenRangeModel.hasRanges()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\t\t\tif (model && range.startColumn === model.getLineMaxColumn(range.startLineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tthis.mouseDownInfo = { lineNumber: range.startLineNumber, iconClicked };\n\t}\n\n\tprivate onEditorMouseUp(e: IEditorMouseEvent): void {\n\t\tconst foldingModel = this.foldingModel;\n\t\tif (!foldingModel || !this.mouseDownInfo || !e.target) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst lineNumber = this.mouseDownInfo.lineNumber;\n\t\tconst iconClicked = this.mouseDownInfo.iconClicked;\n\n\t\tconst range = e.target.range;\n\t\tif (!range || range.startLineNumber !== lineNumber) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (iconClicked) {\n\t\t\tif (e.target.type !== MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\t\tif (!model || range.startColumn !== model.getLineMaxColumn(lineNumber)) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst region = foldingModel.getRegionAtLine(lineNumber);\n\t\tif (region && region.startLineNumber === lineNumber) {\n\t\t\tconst isCollapsed = region.isCollapsed;\n\t\t\tif (iconClicked || isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\tconst surrounding = e.event.altKey;\n\t\t\t\tlet toToggle = [];\n\t\t\t\tif (surrounding) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst filter = (otherRegion: FoldingRegion) => !otherRegion.containedBy(region) && !region.containedBy(otherRegion);\n\t\t\t\t\tconst toMaybeToggle = foldingModel.getRegionsInside(null, filter);\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of toMaybeToggle) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// if any surrounding regions are folded, unfold those. Otherwise, fold all surrounding\n\t\t\t\t\tif (toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle = toMaybeToggle;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst recursive = e.event.middleButton || e.event.shiftKey;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (recursive) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of foldingModel.getRegionsInside(region)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed === isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// when recursive, first only collapse all children. If all are already folded or there are no children, also fold parent.\n\t\t\t\t\tif (isCollapsed || !recursive || toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(region);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfoldingModel.toggleCollapseState(toToggle);\n\t\t\t\tthis.reveal({ lineNumber, column: 1 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tpublic reveal(position: IPosition): void {\n\t\tthis.editor.revealPositionInCenterIfOutsideViewport(position, ScrollType.Smooth);\n\t}\n}\n\nexport class RangesLimitReporter implements FoldingLimitReporter {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01DREDvSP6PKqsDmCvT62nbd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VyiccJ7GEr2ARFZULbQjku","name":"ExitPlanMode","input":{"allowedPrompts":[{"tool":"Bash","prompt":"run unit tests"},{"tool":"Bash","prompt":"build and compile code"},{"tool":"Bash","prompt":"verify TypeScript compilation"}],"plan":"# Implementation Plan: Custom Named Folding Regions with Navigation\n\n## Context\nThis feature adds support for custom named folding regions in VS Code. Users mark regions with special comments like `// #region MySection` / `// #endregion`, and a new command allows jumping to regions via a quick-pick menu showing region names and line numbers.\n\n## Implementation Overview\n\n### 1. Create Named Region Range Provider\n**File:** Create `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts`\n\n- Implement `RangeProvider` interface similar to `IndentRangeProvider`\n- Use regex pattern to detect `#region` and `#endregion` markers: `/^[\\s]*.*#region\\s+(.+)$/`\n- Extract region names from matched lines\n- Store metadata: region name → (startLine, endLine)\n- Create FoldingRegions with region names as type information\n- Return empty FoldingRegions if no named regions found (doesn't block other providers)\n\n**Key class:** `NamedRegionRangeProvider implements RangeProvider`\n- Constructor takes: `ITextModel`, `FoldingLimitReporter`\n- `compute()` method:\n  - Iterate through all lines scanning for `#region` markers\n  - Track start/end pairs\n  - Extract name from marker comment\n  - Build and return FoldingRegions\n\n### 2. Store Named Region Metadata for Navigation\n**File:** Same file `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts`\n\n- Create interface: `NamedRegion { name: string; startLineNumber: number; endLineNumber: number }`\n- Add public method `getNamedRegions(): NamedRegion[]` to provider\n- This enables quick-pick to list all regions with names\n\n### 3. Register \"Go to Named Region\" Command\n**File:** Modify `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts`\n\n- Create new action class `GotoNamedRegionAction extends FoldingAction<void>`\n- Implement `invoke()` to:\n  1. Get the FoldingModel from editor\n  2. Instantiate NamedRegionRangeProvider with current model\n  3. Call `compute()` to get FoldingRegions\n  4. Extract named regions\n  5. Show quick-pick menu with region names and line numbers\n  6. On selection, navigate editor to that region\n- Register command with ID: `editor.action.goToNamedRegion`\n- Keybinding: `Ctrl+Shift+R` / `Cmd+Shift+R` via `kbOpts` in action descriptor\n\n### 4. Integrate Quick-Pick Navigation\n**File:** Same action in `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts`\n\n- Inject `IQuickInputService` via `ServicesAccessor.get(IQuickInputService)`\n- Create quick-pick items array with:\n  - `label`: region name\n  - `description`: line number (e.g., \"Ln 25\")\n  - Store reference to region data\n- Show quick-pick with `quickPick.show()`\n- Handle `onDidAccept` to navigate: `editor.setSelection()` + `foldingController.reveal()`\n- Handle `onDidHide` to clean up\n- Unfold parent regions if needed using `FoldingModel.toggleCollapseState()`\n\n### 5. {\n\t\treturn this._foldingLimitReporter;\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Store view state.\n\t */\n\tpublic saveViewState(): FoldingStateMemento | undefined {\n\t\tconst model = this.editor.getModel();\n\t\tif {\n\t\t\tcase MouseTargetType.GUTTER_LINE_DECORATIONS: {\n\t\t\t\tconst data = e.target.detail;\n\t\t\t\tconst offsetLeftInGutter = e.target.element!.offsetLeft;\n\t\t\t\tconst gutterOffsetX = !region.containedBy(otherRegion);\n\t\t\t\t\tconst toMaybeToggle = foldingModel.getRegionsInside(null, filter);\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of toMaybeToggle) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// if any surrounding regions are folded, unfold those. Otherwise, fold all surrounding\n\t\t\t\t\tif (toToggle.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle = toMaybeToggle;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst recursive = e.event.middleButton || e.event.shiftKey;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (recursive) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const r of foldingModel.getRegionsInside(region)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (r.isCollapsed === isCollapsed) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoToggle.push(r);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t// when recursive, first only collapse all children. If all are already folded or there are no children, also fold parent.\n\t\t\t\t\tif (isCollapsed || !recursive || toToggle.length === 0) Users mark regions with special comments like `// #region MySection` / `// #endregion`, and a new command allows jumping to regions via a quick-pick menu showing region names and line numbers.\n\n## Implementation Overview\n\n### 1. Create Named Region Range Provider\n**File:** Create `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts`\n\n- Implement `RangeProvider` interface similar to `IndentRangeProvider`\n- Use regex pattern to detect `#region` and `#endregion` markers: `/^[\\s]*.*#region\\s+(.+)$/`\n- Extract region names from matched lines\n- Store metadata: region name → (startLine, endLine)\n- Create FoldingRegions with region names as type information\n- Return empty FoldingRegions if no named regions found (doesn't block other providers)\n\n**Key class:** `NamedRegionRangeProvider implements RangeProvider`\n- Constructor takes: `ITextModel`, `FoldingLimitReporter`\n- `compute()` method:\n  - Iterate through all lines scanning for `#region` markers\n  - Track start/end pairs\n  - Extract name from marker comment\n  - Build and return FoldingRegions\n\n### 2. Store Named Region Metadata for Navigation\n**File:** Same file `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts`\n\n- Create interface: `NamedRegion { name: string; startLineNumber: number; endLineNumber: number }`\n- Add public method `getNamedRegions(): NamedRegion[]` to provider\n- This enables quick-pick to list all regions with names\n\n### 3. Register \"Go to Named Region\" Command\n**File:** Modify `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts`\n\n- Create new action class `GotoNamedRegionAction extends FoldingAction<void>`\n- Implement `invoke()` to:\n  1. Get the FoldingModel from editor\n  2. Instantiate NamedRegionRangeProvider with current model\n  3. Call `compute()` to get FoldingRegions\n  4. Extract named regions\n  5. Show quick-pick menu with region names and line numbers\n  6. On selection, navigate editor to that region\n- Register command with ID: `editor.action.goToNamedRegion`\n- Keybinding: `Ctrl+Shift+R` / `Cmd+Shift+R` via `kbOpts` in action descriptor\n\n### 4. Integrate Quick-Pick Navigation\n**File:** Same action in `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts`\n\n- Inject `IQuickInputService` via `ServicesAccessor.get(IQuickInputService)`\n- Create quick-pick items array with:\n  - `label`: region name\n  - `description`: line number (e.g., \"Ln 25\")\n  - Store reference to region data\n- Show quick-pick with `quickPick.show()`\n- Handle `onDidAccept` to navigate: `editor.setSelection()` + `foldingController.reveal()`\n- Handle `onDidHide` to clean up\n- Unfold parent regions if needed using `FoldingModel.toggleCollapseState()`\n\n### 5. Create Named Region Range Provider\n**File:** Create `/workspace/src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionRangeProvider.ts`\n\n- Implement `RangeProvider` interface similar to `IndentRangeProvider`\n- Use regex pattern to detect `#region` and `#endregion` markers: `/^[\\s]*.*#region\\s+(.+)$/`\n- Extract region names from matched lines\n- Store metadata: region name → (startLine, endLine)\n- Create FoldingRegions with region names as type information\n- Return empty FoldingRegions if no named regions found (doesn't block other providers)\n\n**Key class:** `NamedRegionRangeProvider implements RangeProvider`\n- Constructor takes: `ITextModel`, `FoldingLimitReporter`\n- `compute()` method:\n  - Iterate through all lines scanning for `#region` markers\n  - Track start/end pairs\n  - Extract name from marker comment\n  - Build and return FoldingRegions\n\n### 2.
